name: Don's Loans
description_short: Don's Loans is a pawn shop in Galena, OH licensed by the ATF to buy, sell, and lend against firearms and other collateral.
description_long:
Don's Loans, operated by Donald L. Hackworth, is a federally licensed pawnbroker located at 2465 Africa Road in Galena, Ohio. The business holds an active Federal Firearms License (FFL Type 02) issued by the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms, and Explosives, qualifying it to engage in pawn transactions involving firearms other than destructive devices.

As a licensed pawnbroker, Don's Loans offers collateral-based lending services typical of pawn shops. Customers can pledge personal items—including firearms, jewelry, electronics, and other valuables—in exchange for immediate cash loans. The business operates as a traditional pawn operation, allowing borrowers to reclaim their items upon repayment of the loan plus applicable interest and fees within the agreed timeframe.

The business maintains its federal firearms licensing through the ATF, indicating compliance with federal regulations governing firearms transactions. Don's Loans operates locally within the Galena, Ohio community and can be reached by phone at 740-549-3555 for inquiries about pawn services and loan terms.

Prospective customers should note that the FFL information available online indicates an expiration date of June 1, 2023. Any individual considering using Don's Loans services should verify the current status of the business license and confirm operational details directly with the business, as pawn shop licensing and firearms licensing requirements are strictly regulated at both federal and state levels.
pros: Licensed by the ATF with a valid Federal Firearms License for firearms transactions
Established local business serving the Galena, Ohio community
Operates as a collateral-based lender, providing immediate cash without credit checks
Phone contact available for customer inquiries (740-549-3555)
Accepts multiple types of collateral including firearms and other valuables
cons: FFL listed as expired as of June 1, 2023—operational status unclear
Limited information available about loan terms, interest rates, and fee structures
No website with service details, online application, or customer reviews accessible
Located in a rural area (Galena, OH) which may limit accessibility for some consumers
No documented customer service channels beyond a single phone number
best_for: Local Galena, Ohio residents needing quick cash against collateral
Individuals with firearms or valuables to pawn for short-term loans
Borrowers without credit history or those unable to qualify for traditional loans
diagnosis: Don's Loans is best suited for Galena, Ohio residents needing immediate cash against collateral, particularly those with firearms or valuables to pawn. Critical caveat: the FFL is listed as expired (June 1, 2023), so customers must verify the business is currently operational and licensed before engaging services.
services: Electronics and valuable goods collateral loans
